title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: app remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle time with headset disconnected
steps: Install and launch app, pair headset, then turn off headset and go to app Home Screen
Leave phone idle with app in foreground
expected: Home screen shows headset as disconnected; app remains stable; app still running and responsive after several hours
